title: Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn
description: New version of an addon for Cobblemon that makes pokemon run away or fight back when agitated and much more.
body:
New version of original addon from Rufia. ([Cobblemon - Fight or Flight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fight-or-flight))

Updated for newer versions of Cobblemon with added features and bugfixes.
Recode done by LyquidQrystal.
Feel free to post issues and any feedback on his github, where you can also find the source code. 
[https://github.com/LyquidQrystal/fightorflight](https://github.com/LyquidQrystal/fightorflight)

-------------------
Addon which adds combat outside of standard pokemon battles.
Also makes your mons defend you from hostile minecraft monsters (zombie, skeleton, etc.)

**Features:**
- Pokemon either fight back or run away when attacked by the player, or in response to a failed attempt to catch them. Whether they flee or fight depends on each pokemon's offensive stats compared to their defensive stats, their level as well as their nature.
- In addition, particularly aggressive pokemon won't even wait to be attacked - attacking any players that get too close. (disabled by default, can be configured)
- Pokemon of different types apply different effects to the player when they hit you.
- Pokemon has ranged attack if Sp.ATK is higher than its ATK. With different types, effects and damage. Explosive moves can cause an explosion, HP draining moves can heal your Pokemon from the damage they dealt.
- The player's Pokemon use the first move in the move set (calculate type and damage from it). You can use the Poke Staff to select the move you want to use, even forcing a special attacker to melee!
- Mobs killed by your pokemon will drop items and experience like it was killed by a tamed wolf.
- Your pokemon can gain experience and ev by killing pokemon without starting a pokemon battle. (needs to be the last mob that deals the damage,can be disabled in the config)
- Your pokemon can evolve by using the move to hit other mobs instead of starting a Pokemon Battle(e.g. Primeape needs to use Rage Fist 20 times to evolve,now you can do it without a traditional Pokemon Battle)(Configurable).
- Adds the Oran Lucky Egg(held item) to gain more experience from pokemon killed by your pokemon,right-click your pokemon while sneaking to give the item to the pokemon. (The Oran Lucky Egg won't give you extra xp from any other ways!)
- Your pokemon can taunt the pokemon that attacks you. Moves(taunt,follow me,rage powder,torment) are needed,and they need to be set as the first move in the move set. to taunt the wild pokemon.
- Pokemon with higher defense stat can lower the damage it take
- Some abilities can lower the nearby pokemon's aggro.

Most of the features are configurable - you can set which pokemon are always aggressive, which are never, use different multipliers etc. Everyting can be set in **config/fightorflight.json5** file.
